description: I’ve had a very positive experience with Beehiiv overall. It’s one of the easiest platforms I’ve used for creating, growing, and monetizing a newsletter. I like that it combines writing, email sending, a website, analytics, and monetization tools all in one place. The interface is clean and modern, and it makes it easy to focus on publishing instead of piecing together multiple tools. Overall, I would definitely recommend Beehiiv to creators, coaches, and businesses that want to build a newsletter and turn it into a real business. It’s especially strong if your goal is audience growth and monetization, not just sending emails.
author: Gabby W.
pros: Pros: Very easy to set up and use, even for beginners Built-in tools for growing a newsletter, including referrals, recommendations, and subscriber tracking Includes monetization features like paid subscriptions, ads, and sponsorships with no platform fees Clean analytics dashboard and built-in website/blog features Generous free plan that lets you get started before paying
cons: Cons: The jump from the free plan to the paid plan can feel expensive Automation features are more limited than dedicated email marketing platforms There are fewer integrations and customization options than some older tools It can take a little time to learn the more advanced growth and monetization features
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The buzz is real with Beehiiv
description: It has been wonderful and allowed me to build an audience in my niche
author: Brian Z.
pros: Beehiiv has made it very easy for me to start a newsletter, without having to worry about SEO, design or coding.
cons: The push notifications can be worked on, as I don't get notified when I get a new subscriber, or when someone unsubscribes

review_title: A smooth, creator-friendly platform with room to grow
author: Inamari N.
pros: I really like how simple and intuitive Beehiiv is to use. It feels built with creators in mind, so setting up emails, editing content, and managing my list never feels overwhelming. The layout is clean, the features are easy to find, and I don’t have to wrestle with the platform to get things done. I also appreciate how quickly you can get started, it makes writing and sending newsletters feel straightforward rather than like a big technical task.
cons: Some features feel a bit limited or basic compared to other platforms I’ve used. There are moments where I wish there was more flexibility with customisation, especially around design and automation. It’s a great platform overall, but a few areas still feel like they’re catching up, and I sometimes find myself wanting a bit more control.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Migrated from Legacy Infrastructure to beehiiv
description: It's been a great experience for me- I came off an old fragmented legacy infrastructure that was frankly held together with duct tape and baling wire. Many classic problems of the WordPress architecture just go away when moving to a modern infrastructure. I have had excellent customer support when I need to clarify things, and they are very open to feedback on features I am looking for. You can't ask for much more than that. I love the boosts features. As a legacy publisher, these were new for me and took a bit to get used to. I use a limited amount of ads- this will get more robust over time.
author: Amber C.
pros: For what I need, it is a great solution. I was coming off a WordPress, Thrivecart, Brevo combo platter. This is giving me all I need in one platform, which has been great. Yes, as an earlier stage company they are continuously rolling out new features. It will keep getting more and more robust over time, and the gains I have received so far more than make up for any features I am waiting for.
cons: Email templates for newsletters would be nice just to make it easier to get started. I find some of the ad features a little confusing as I am still getting used to how these all work.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A solid and very user friendly platform
description: I'm very positive. I looked into several alternatives looking for a solution about a year ago. No question I made the right choise.
author: Jakob J.
pros: I've been using beehiiv for about a year and I'm impressed by both their newsletter and blog platform. It just works and is very user friendly. Also quite impressed by their freequent updates. They just keep shipping new features at a very steady pace.
cons: Can't think of any - and I'm not affiliated in any way :-)

review_title: Caused Major Deliverability Problems, Readers Didn't Get Our Emails
description: Overall, moving to beehiiv was a waste of time as we had to migrate to another platform after just a few months. It looked good initially, but ultimately we were better off with ConvertKit (now Kit)
author: Alexander Z.
pros: The interface is well designed, and access to high quality advertisers make it easy to build a business on their platform
cons: Beehiiv has serious deliverability issues. We had to move off the platform as readers were no longer getting our emails. Their customer service was also quite poor, as they didn't respond when we reached out for help.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great platform, 20% off and competitive prices is a welcome bonus
description: After over a year of using beehiiv, I'm very happy and couldn't imagine using another platform. The amount of monetisation options is significant and the cost is affordable. Good job all round.
author: Kristian G.
pros: Easy to use, growth and monetisation options are powerful. Works out cheaper than most other platforms, with 20% off first three months of paid plans and a 30-day free trial - https://www.beehiiv.com/?via=start-a-newsletter-today Very good platform overall.
cons: I would like to see email newsletter templates introduced. While the customisation tools are powerful to create any style newsletter without any code, it would be nice to have a head start with some best practices already in place.

description: Overall, Beehiiv has helped me start a newsletter and get to grips with email marketing. It's fairly cost effective, especially for smaller subscription lists. I haven't found all the features available yet though, as it can be difficult and confusing to navigate the site.
author: Genevieve M.
pros: Beehiiv is cost effective, especially when starting out with email marketing. It offers a lot of features and multiple ways of generating revenue.
cons: Beehiiv is quite complicated to get the hang of, and you can't see your newsletter as you're making it; you have to format it and then preview to see what it looks like. This means it takes more time to get it right. The User Interface is quite busy and can be confusing to navigate.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great. Having a human reach out to me to help works wonders. It shows that they care. It brings out the humility in writers LOL
author: Chaitanya Prabhu H.
pros: Finally found an app for writers who don't need to worry about the technical aspects of online publishing. Everything is taken care of for you. I get to focus on my writing.
cons: Nothing so far. Everything is working fine. Not a negative, but Beehiiv could set up an app for book writers like me. Take care of all the publishing and online promotions.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Not upto the mark. Because, many a features are not working for me like there are not email templates and the software is particularly newsletter writing.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I liked boosts and getting affiliates in form of ADs. even at such a less number of subscriber base i was getting ads to do.
cons: Automation. NO proper guidance to setup automations.

description: I started a newsletter recently and wanted software easy to use with nice templates that can be used fast. I like also the content they produce on their blog to get more subscribers, create a lead magnet, and refine your newsletter design...
author: Jerome D.
pros: Beehiiv is easy and intuitive to use. The templates offer ideas to customize your newsletter. besides, Beehiiv has most of the features you would need to start a newsletter fast.
cons: The pricing can increase quite a bit when you get more customers to your list, but it's up to you to find ways to monetize your audience.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Graydon U.
pros: Beehiiv is super simple and easy to use, making it perfect for creating a side business while having fun. The platform is constantly releasing new features at a blistering pace. It offers excellent tools for monetization, analytics, segmentation, and automation. Simply the best platform out there!
cons: Honestly, there is nothing I dislike about beehiiv. It's been a fantastic experience overall.

review_title: Email isn't Dead, The Tool That Gives Your Newsletters a Boost
description: I love the feature set but haven't used it as much as I'd like due to the learning curve. The affiliate & referral emails are awesomely engaging and it seems like a strong community has been created. Looking forward to growing my audience through the platform.
author: Courtney J.
pros: Generous free plan that lets you grow a healthy subscriber base. Ability to customize a website and use advanced HTML in your newsletters. Great referral plan that keeps affiliates engaged. The platform even helps you earn a little extra revenue in the process if you're on a paid plan.
cons: - There's a bit of a learning curve, especially for beginners or those not used to newsletters. The resource section is frequently updated and tutorials added so its gotten a little bit better. - While there's a very generous free plan (Called Launch), the leap in price to the next level can give some sticker shock. There's not much you can do on the basic plan beside grow your list so plan to monetize externally.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Exceptional service, I have had no issues.
author: Andre S.
pros: The email delivery is top notch, fast delivery with a high inbox rate.
cons: There are truly no real cons about the service, the only issue maybe for some users to be well aware that your lists need to be truly opt-in to maintain great delivery.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My overall experience with BeeHiiv has been very good, great customer service!
author: Collis C.
pros: To be honest, I like everything about them!
cons: At this time, I can't think of anything I would change right now!
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
